name: LLM_OUTPUT_VALIDATOR
description: Schema-based output validation console with retry correction, audit logs, and SQLite-safe persistence.

scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm --dir backend install && pnpm --dir frontend install
scripts.dev: concurrently "pnpm --dir backend run dev" "pnpm --dir frontend run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --dir backend run build && pnpm --dir frontend run build
scripts.prisma:migrate: pnpm --dir backend prisma migrate dev --name init
